rules.rule_text:
rule RogueWinwebsecSample
{
	meta:
		Description = "Rogue.Winwebsec.sm"
		ThreatLevel = "5"

	strings:
		$a = "%s%s\\%s.ico" ascii wide
		$b = "%s%s\\%s.exe" ascii wide

	condition:
		$a or $b
}

rule RogueSShieldSample
{
	meta:
		Description = "Rogue.SShield.sm"
		ThreatLevel = "5"

	strings:
		$a = "64C665BE" wide
		$b = "BC0172B25DF2" wide

	condition:
		$a or $b
}
